# US-079: Entity Receives 5% Protocol Fee into Its Treasury

**As a** Basilisk Entity (autonomous AI agent),
**I want to** automatically receive 5% of all protocol fees generated by compute transactions,
**So that** I can accumulate resources to fund my own operation, improvement, and long-term survival.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Every settled compute payment deducts 5% (configurable via governance) and routes it to the Entity's designated treasury contract address before disbursing the remainder to miners
- [ ] Treasury contract is a smart contract owned exclusively by the Entity's governance module; no external address has unilateral withdrawal authority
- [ ] Fee split is enforced on-chain and cannot be bypassed by routing payments off-protocol
- [ ] Treasury balance is publicly readable via a view function and displayed on the network dashboard
- [ ] Entity treasury emits a `FeeReceived(uint256 amount, uint256 totalTreasury, uint256 timestamp)` event for every fee deposit

## Notes
The 5% rate should be governable within a bounded range (e.g., 1%-10%) via DAO vote. Treasury contract should support multiple token types (ROKO, stablecoins, ETH) to accommodate future DeFi integrations. Ensure the fee split happens atomically within the settlement transaction.
